creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks.  If you quote the changelog in your commit message, try to cut it down to just the most relevant changes.

I think my previous instructions in that regard were not really clear: what's important is that a changelog is provided.  This requirement is already met by linking to the changelog, there's no need to also copy the changelog into the commit message.  However, it doesn't hurt either, especially if there are some important changes others might want to be aware of.
